---
type: command
title: Deploy Command
description: Deploy to a named environment and region.
tags: [deploy]
---
<!-- canonical: single-block command, no language key (bare fence), vars with defaults, 1 tag -->

```
./deploy.sh <VK-env> <VK-region>
```

vars:
```vks
VK-env=staging
VK-region=us-east-1
```
